testcase.name: shouldCreateSupportTicket

integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists address cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists cart cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists cart_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists category cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists coupon cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customer cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists image cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists inventory cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists inventory_movement cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_return cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists orders cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists product cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists promotion cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists review cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists saved_card_token cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists session cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists shipment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists support_ticket cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists technical_specification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists variant cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists warranty cascade Hibernate: create table address (is_default boolean, customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, city varchar(255) not null, complement varchar(255), neighborhood varchar(255), number varchar(255), state varchar(255) not null, street varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('BILLING','SHIPPING')), zip_code varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table cart (created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table cart_item (quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, cart_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table category (display_order integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_category_id bigint, icon varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, slug varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table coupon (coupon_value numeric(38,2) not null, current_usage integer, max_usage integer, minimum_order numeric(38,2), expires_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, code varchar(255) not null unique, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('PERCENTAGE','FIXED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table customer (birth_date date, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), tax_id varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table image (display_order integer, is_primary boolean, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, alt varchar(255), url varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory (quantity integer not null, reorder_point integer, reserved_quantity integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory_movement (quantity integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('INBOUND','OUTBOUND','RESERVED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_return (approved_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('REQUESTED','APPROVED','REJECTED','COMPLETED')), type varchar(255) check (type in ('EXCHANGE','REFUND')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_item (quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, variant_id bigint not null, name_snapshot varchar(255), sku_snapshot varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table orders (discount numeric(38,2), shipping numeric(38,2), subtotal numeric(38,2) not null, total numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','CANCELLED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment (amount numeric(38,2) not null, installments integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, paid_at timestamp(6), gateway varchar(255), gateway_transaction_id varchar(255), method varchar(255) not null check (method in ('PIX','CREDIT_CARD','BANK_SLIP')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','FAILED','REFUNDED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table product (active boolean, base_price numeric(38,2) not null, promotional_price numeric(38,2), warranty_months integer, weight numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), description varchar(255), dimensions varchar(255), model varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, sku varchar(255) not null unique, technical_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table promotion (featured_home boolean, promotional_price numeric(38,2) not null, ends_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, starts_at timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table review (rating integer not null, verified_purchase boolean, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, comment varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table saved_card_token (customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), expiration varchar(255), gateway_token varchar(255) not null, last4digits varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table session (customer_id bigint not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, ip varchar(255), token varchar(255) not null unique, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table shipment (cost numeric(38,2), estimated_days integer, delivered_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, shipped_at timestamp(6), carrier varchar(255), service varchar(255) check (service in ('STANDARD','EXPRESS','OVERNIGHT')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','SHIPPED','IN_TRANSIT','DELIVERED','RETURNED')), tracking_code varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table support_ticket (created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint, channel varchar(255) check (channel in ('CHAT','EMAIL')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED')), subject varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table technical_specification (id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, spec_key varchar(255) not null, spec_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table variant (extra_price numeric(38,2), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, attribute varchar(255) not null check (attribute in ('COLOR','STORAGE','VOLTAGE')), variant_sku varchar(255), variant_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table warranty (end_date date, start_date date, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_item_id bigint not null, serial_number varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists address add constraint FK93c3js0e22ll1xlu21nvrhqgg foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart add constraint FKdebwvad6pp1ekiqy5jtixqbaj foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FK1uobyhgl1wvgt1jpccia8xxs3 foreign key (cart_id) references cart Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FKbs0rqg5p72wam1eby4765nybi foreign key not null, variant_id bigint not null, name_snapshot varchar(255), sku_snapshot varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table orders (discount numeric(38,2), shipping numeric(38,2), subtotal org.hibernate.orm.deprecation : HHH90000025: H2Dialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) 2026-03-09T20:31:47.009Z INFO 4817 --- [ecommerce] [ main] o.h.e.t.j.p.i.JtaPlatformInitiator : HHH000489: No JTA platform available (set 'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists address cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists cart cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists cart_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists category cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists coupon cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists customer cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists image cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists inventory cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists inventory_movement cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_return cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists order_item cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists orders cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists payment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists product cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists promotion cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists review cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists saved_card_token cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists session cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists shipment cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists support_ticket cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists technical_specification cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists variant cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists warranty cascade Hibernate: create table address (is_default boolean, customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, city varchar(255) not null, complement varchar(255), neighborhood varchar(255), number varchar(255), state varchar(255) not null, street varchar(255) not null, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('BILLING','SHIPPING')), zip_code varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table cart (created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table cart_item (quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, cart_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table category (display_order integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, parent_category_id bigint, icon varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, slug varchar(255) not null unique, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table coupon (coupon_value numeric(38,2) not null, current_usage integer, max_usage integer, minimum_order numeric(38,2), expires_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, code varchar(255) not null unique, type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('PERCENTAGE','FIXED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table customer (birth_date date, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), tax_id varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table image (display_order integer, is_primary boolean, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, alt varchar(255), url varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory (quantity integer not null, reorder_point integer, reserved_quantity integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory_movement (quantity integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('INBOUND','OUTBOUND','RESERVED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_return (approved_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('REQUESTED','APPROVED','REJECTED','COMPLETED')), type varchar(255) check (type in ('EXCHANGE','REFUND')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_item (quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, variant_id bigint not null, name_snapshot varchar(255), sku_snapshot varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table orders (discount numeric(38,2), shipping numeric(38,2), subtotal numeric(38,2) not null, total numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','CANCELLED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment (amount numeric(38,2) not null, installments integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, paid_at timestamp(6), gateway varchar(255), gateway_transaction_id varchar(255), method varchar(255) not null check (method in ('PIX','CREDIT_CARD','BANK_SLIP')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','FAILED','REFUNDED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table product (active boolean, base_price numeric(38,2) not null, promotional_price numeric(38,2), warranty_months integer, weight numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), description varchar(255), dimensions varchar(255), model varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, sku varchar(255) not null unique, technical_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table promotion (featured_home boolean, promotional_price numeric(38,2) not null, ends_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, starts_at timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table review (rating integer not null, verified_purchase boolean, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, comment varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table saved_card_token (customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), expiration varchar(255), gateway_token varchar(255) not null, last4digits varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table session (customer_id bigint not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, ip varchar(255), token varchar(255) not null unique, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table shipment (cost numeric(38,2), estimated_days integer, delivered_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, shipped_at timestamp(6), carrier varchar(255), service varchar(255) check (service in ('STANDARD','EXPRESS','OVERNIGHT')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','SHIPPED','IN_TRANSIT','DELIVERED','RETURNED')), tracking_code varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table support_ticket (created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint, channel varchar(255) check (channel in ('CHAT','EMAIL')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED')), subject varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table technical_specification (id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, spec_key varchar(255) not null, spec_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table variant (extra_price numeric(38,2), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, attribute varchar(255) not null check (attribute in ('COLOR','STORAGE','VOLTAGE')), variant_sku varchar(255), variant_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table warranty (end_date date, start_date date, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_item_id bigint not null, serial_number varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists address add constraint FK93c3js0e22ll1xlu21nvrhqgg foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart add constraint FKdebwvad6pp1ekiqy5jtixqbaj foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FK1uobyhgl1wvgt1jpccia8xxs3 foreign key (cart_id) references cart Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FKbs0rqg5p72wam1eby4765nybi foreign key (variant_id) references variant Hibernate: alter table if exists category add constraint FKs2ride9gvilxy2tcuv7witnxc foreign key (parent_category_id) references category Hibernate: alter table if exists image add constraint FKgpextbyee3uk9u6o2381m7ft1 foreign key (product_id) references product Hibernate: alter table if exists inventory add constraint FKcvrmxijkj481ubvfuxjgufw3t foreign key (variant_id) references variant Hibernate: alter table if exists inventory_movement add constraint FK1e4u40n16tphst0xbd35n8fav foreign key (variant_id) references variant Hibernate: alter table if orders add constraint FK624gtjin3po807j3vix093tlf foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists payment add constraint FKlouu98csyullos9k25tbpk4va foreign key create table address (is_default boolean, customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, city varchar(255) not null, complement varchar(255), neighborhood varchar(255), date, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, email varchar(255) not null unique, name varchar(255) not null, phone varchar(255), tax_id varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table image (display_order integer, is_primary boolean, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, alt varchar(255), url varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory (quantity integer not null, reorder_point integer, reserved_quantity integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table inventory_movement (quantity integer not null, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, variant_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), type varchar(255) not null check (type in ('INBOUND','OUTBOUND','RESERVED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_return (approved_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, reason varchar(255), status varchar(255) check (status in ('REQUESTED','APPROVED','REJECTED','COMPLETED')), type varchar(255) check (type in ('EXCHANGE','REFUND')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table order_item (quantity integer not null, unit_price numeric(38,2) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, variant_id bigint not null, name_snapshot varchar(255), sku_snapshot varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table orders (discount numeric(38,2), shipping numeric(38,2), subtotal numeric(38,2) not null, total numeric(38,2) not null, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','CANCELLED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table payment (amount numeric(38,2) not null, installments integer, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, paid_at timestamp(6), gateway varchar(255), gateway_transaction_id varchar(255), method varchar(255) not null check (method in ('PIX','CREDIT_CARD','BANK_SLIP')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PAID','FAILED','REFUNDED')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table product (active boolean, base_price numeric(38,2) not null, promotional_price numeric(38,2), warranty_months integer, weight numeric(38,2), created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), description varchar(255), dimensions varchar(255), model varchar(255), name varchar(255) not null, sku varchar(255) not null unique, technical_description varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table promotion (featured_home boolean, promotional_price numeric(38,2) not null, ends_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, starts_at timestamp(6), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table review (rating integer not null, verified_purchase boolean, created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, comment varchar(255), title varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table saved_card_token (customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, brand varchar(255), expiration varchar(255), gateway_token varchar(255) not null, last4digits varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table session (customer_id bigint not null, expires_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, ip varchar(255), token varchar(255) not null unique, user_agent varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table shipment (cost numeric(38,2), estimated_days integer, delivered_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint not null, shipped_at timestamp(6), carrier varchar(255), service varchar(255) check (service in ('STANDARD','EXPRESS','OVERNIGHT')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('PENDING','SHIPPED','IN_TRANSIT','DELIVERED','RETURNED')), tracking_code varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table support_ticket (created_at timestamp(6), customer_id bigint not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_id bigint, channel varchar(255) check (channel in ('CHAT','EMAIL')), status varchar(255) check (status in ('OPEN','IN_PROGRESS','RESOLVED','CLOSED')), subject varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table technical_specification (id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, spec_key varchar(255) not null, spec_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table variant (extra_price numeric(38,2), id bigint generated by default as identity, product_id bigint not null, attribute varchar(255) not null check (attribute in ('COLOR','STORAGE','VOLTAGE')), variant_sku varchar(255), variant_value varchar(255) not null, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table warranty (end_date date, start_date date, id bigint generated by default as identity, order_item_id bigint not null, serial_number varchar(255), status varchar(255), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists address add constraint FK93c3js0e22ll1xlu21nvrhqgg foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart add constraint FKdebwvad6pp1ekiqy5jtixqbaj foreign key (customer_id) references customer Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FK1uobyhgl1wvgt1jpccia8xxs3 foreign key (cart_id) references cart Hibernate: alter table if exists cart_item add constraint FKbs0rqg5p72wam1eby4765nybi foreign key
